landing.heroDesc: Google Maps shows the fastest route. <1>StreetCheck</1> shows the safest one. Bypass waterlogged underpasses, dark streets, and pothole-ridden lanes.

features.title: Safety Beyond Just Routing
features.desc: Unlike generic maps, StreetCheck evaluates every city street along five distinct safety verticals derived from verified municipal, geo, and crowd-sourced databases.

lighting.title: Lighting
lighting.desc: Illumination density and network lighting statuses mapped from OpenStreetMap tags.

flood.title: Flood Risk
flood.desc: Vulnerability mapping derived from HYDRAA reports and low-lying stormwater logs.

surface.title: Road Surface
surface.desc: Presence of potholes, broken concrete, or severe street cracking and municipal logs.

walkability.title: Walkability
walkability.desc: Paved sidewalks, clear pedestrian curbs, and footpath width coverage indicators.

accident.title: Accident Rate
accident.desc: Historical accident hotspots compiled from MoRTH databases and black-spot coordinates.

step1.title: View Heatmap
step1.desc: See Hyderabad roads color-coded live on our Leaflet map based on multi-dimensional safety scores.

step2.title: Compare Routes
step2.desc: Get fastest vs safest paths calculated side-by-side using real-time graphs and Claude AI explanations.

step3.title: Report Hazard
step3.desc: Tap directly on the map to flag broken lights, waterlogging, or potholed roads instantly.

cta.title: Hyderabad's roads, scored for safety.
cta.desc: Open the safety map, select your route, and navigate the city with peace of mind.

landing.footer: © {{year}} StreetCheck Hyderabad. Built for the Swecha Hackathon 2026. Anonymous & PII-Free.

about.title: About StreetCheck
about.desc: StreetCheck is Hyderabad's civic road safety intelligence platform. Similar to CrystalRoof in the UK, it evaluates every road segment in the city on five key safety dimensions to empower citizens to make safer, better-informed navigation decisions.

model.title: Safety Scoring Model
model.desc: Safety scores are calculated dynamically per road segment based on locked weights:

lighting.name: Lighting Score
lighting.desc: Street-by-street streetlight coverage and tag validations

accident.name: Accident Safety (1 - rate)
accident.desc: Normalized historical accident black spot density mapping

flood.name: Flood Safety (1 - risk)
flood.desc: Monsoon waterlogging zones, drains, and low points

surface.name: Surface Quality
surface.desc: Pothole frequencies, road surface materials, and cracks

walkability.name: Walkability Score
walkability.desc: Footpath presence, walk widths, and sidewalk coverage

sources.title: Municipal Data Sources
sources.osm: Road hierarchies, lighting nodes, and sidewalk infrastructure.
sources.hydraa: Monsoon waterlogging hotspots and lake-overflow zones.
sources.morth: High-risk traffic black spots and historical accident data.

safety.title: Important Exclusions & Safety
safety.noCrimeDesc: StreetCheck does not collect, model, or discuss policing data, crime statistics, or socioeconomic factors.
safety.anonDesc: Reports are logged anonymously using a locally generated token. No Personal Identifiable Information (PII) is tracked.
safety.exclusionNotes: Calculations are restricted to the Hyderabad metropolitan region only. AI summaries and routing insights are powered by context-locked Anthropic Claude APIs.

footer.inspiration: Inspired by the CrystalRoof UK safety platform. Swecha Hackathon 2026.

routeSummary.fastest: The <1>Fastest</1> route takes the shortest physical distance. It contains <3>{{count}} unsafe segments</3>.
routeSummary.safest: The <1>Safest</1> route prioritizes well-lit, low-risk streets, bypassing major hazard zones. It contains <3>{{count}} safe segments</3>.

finder.title: Safety Route Finder
finder.errOrigin: Could not parse Origin. Use "Kondapur" or "lat, lng" coordinates.
finder.errDest: Could not parse Destination. Use "Gachibowli" or "lat, lng" coordinates.

map.reportPrompt: Please click on a road segment on the map first to report a hazard.

assistant.title: StreetCheck Assistant
assistant.welcome: Hi! I am your StreetCheck road safety assistant. Ask me about lighting, flood risks, surface conditions, or route safety in Hyderabad.
assistant.offline: I am currently offline or unable to reach the Claude AI service. Please check your connection and try again.

starters.safeNight: Is it safe to walk here at night?
starters.floodProne: Are there any flood-prone roads nearby?

reportModal.title: Report Hazard
reportModal.aiDesc: AI detected: <1>{{type}}</1> with <3>{{confidence}}%</3> confidence. Is this correct?
reportModal.notePlaceholder: Provide extra details e.g., 'Right lane flooded' or 'broken cover'...

photoUploader.dragDrop: Drag & drop image here or click to browse
